\]

and
\[ \frac{p}{q} < \frac{4}{7} \implies 7p < 4q \implies 7p - 1 < 4q. \]

\[ 7 \times 7 - 1 < 4 \times 12 \implies 48 < 48 \]

\[ 5 \times 14 \leq 9p - 1 \implies 71 \leq 9p \implies p \geq \frac{71}{9} \approx 7.89 \]
